Class WorkVisa

java.lang.Object
classes.Application
classes.WorkVisa
public class WorkVisa extends Application
Work visa application class with employment information,and extends the applications class.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Abdul Hadi

  • Constructor Details

    • WorkVisa

      public WorkVisa(int appliactionNO, LocalDate submissionDate, Applicant applicant, Status status, Officer officer, String companyName, double salary, int contractYears)
      Constructs a WorkVisa application.
      Parameters:
      submissionDate - the submission date
      applicant - the applicant
      status - the current status
      officer - the assigned officer (may be null)
      companyName - the name of the employing company
      salary - the offered salary
      contractYears - the contract duration in years
      appNo - the application number
